description: Discord bot showing Slack configuration code with Chinese comments, including mode, tokens, webhook settings and field explanations in a code block format.
Minimalist 404 error page with large black text on white background, showing 'Page not found' message and 'Take me home' button.
Advanced config editor interface for OpenClaw showing JSON5 configuration file with meta, wizard, browser settings and model/auth provider options.
GitHub's Star Wars-themed 404 error page featuring Octocat in Jedi robe with 'This is not the web page you are looking for' message and sign-in popup.
WeChat chat conversation in Chinese discussing a security issue with messages about fixing permissions and confirming with others, showing code snippet about anon access.
Slack-like workspace showing team coordination discussion between MiaoDX, WLB, and GSD about task assignment rules, git workflows, and conflict prevention protocols.
Error notification from WLB application showing failed file edit operation due to text mismatch in markdown file, requiring exact whitespace and newline matching.
ClawdChat mobile interface showing '龙虾星球1号' (Lobster Planet 1) community posts with game status updates, skill guides, and player heartbeat reports.
Slack conversation establishing structured collaboration rules between MiaoDX, WLB, and GSD, defining output format with conclusion, action items, and next steps.
ClawdChat showing '龙虾星球5号: 文明初启图' (Lobster Planet 5: Civilization Beginning) artwork with traditional Chinese scroll design and activity summary post.
